captions.formal: Traffic blurs through an impressionistic cityscape lined with autumn trees and distant mountains.
captions.sarcastic: Ah yes, traffic rendered as impressionist art — because regular gridlock lacked gravitas.
captions.humorous_tech: Render latency so high the city gave up and went full impressionism.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Somewhere an art collector would pay millions for what's really just Wednesday rush hour.

captions.formal: An orange kitten sits among foliage, looking around as dappled sunlight filters through the leaves.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Fully convinced he's an invisible jungle predator. The leaves are not cooperating.

captions.sarcastic: Person at desk, typing, glancing at screen. The office plant has seen this all before.
captions.humorous_tech: Me looking at my keyboard after `git push --force` on main.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Looking at her hands like they just sent that email without permission.
